full_text:
Deng Zhi (Bomiao) 鄧芝 (伯苗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Zhi (鄧芝), styledBomiao (伯苗), was born in Xinye, Xiyang. Served Zhuge Liang. Was responsible for restoration of alliance with Wu. Deng Zhi was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Deng Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
